narrative:
Huber Heights City has 29,289 registered voters, with 61.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.2% D−R vs -6.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
